title: InteractionRequired
description: Event: `interaction_required`. The Rich Interactions envelope: emitted mid-turn when the agent requests a structured interaction (identity intake, a date picker, choice chips, …) and the session declared the interaction kind's render capability in `supports` at `create_conversation_session`. The turn is parked until the client replies with a `submit_interaction` action carrying the same `requestId` + `interactionId` (values or `declined: true`). Sessions without the capability never receive this event — the server degrades that kind to its conversational fallback instead. `kind` selects the client card and the server validator; `spec` is the kind-specific payload whose shape is defined by `interactions/<kind>.schema.json` (e.g. `interactions/identity-intake.schema.json#/$defs/Spec`).

requestId.description: Echoes the `requestId` from the originating `send_message` action. Must be included in the `submit_interaction` reply.
The request ID this interaction belongs to.

data.description: The interaction the client should render.

interactionId.description: Server-generated ID for this specific interaction instance. Must be echoed on the `submit_interaction` reply so a stale submit can never resolve a newer park.

kind.description: The interaction kind (e.g. `identity_intake`). Selects the client's card component and the server's validator. The kind catalog lives in `spec/interactions/`.

spec.description: Kind-specific render spec. Shape per `interactions/<kind>.schema.json#/$defs/Spec` (e.g. identity_intake's `{ fields: [...] }`).

reason.description: Human-readable reason the agent raised this interaction, suitable for the card header (e.g. `to send you the quote`).

timestamp.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the event was emitted.
